name: pinnedai
description: Smoke-test AI-built features so they actually work — not just parse. `pinned smoke add` runs your endpoint and asserts real invariants. `pinned render add` renders EVERY route in a collection (Next.js generateStaticParams, a getter, sitemap) — adding a new row covers it automatically. `pinned visibility add` asserts the negative — drafts MUST return 404, not 200 (catches leaks render pins miss). `pinned dev` boots your dev server + runs pins locally with zero config. Auto-detects Vercel / Netlify / Cloudflare Pages / Render preview URLs in CI. Plus: enum-drift contracts, FP suppression, readiness gate, AI-lesson sync into CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursorrules. Free beta · Founder Pro waitlist open.
author: Michael Zon
